name: qa-claude
description: Open-source Claude Code plugin for QA/QC engineers, QA Managers and Product Ops using AI: scaffold a standard POM project from scratch (one command → a compiling Playwright-Web or Appium-App framework + example test), web/mobile automation, test-case generation, exploratory testing, review, plus quality management (metrics dashboard, deep bug-board analysis, Go/No-Go release gate, requirement traceability, release notes, risk matrix, RICE triage, SLA compliance, story-point estimation, bug explainer/dedup). Install once, use across projects; commands are namespaced as /qa:<command>. Automation and manual QA have distinct command names; automation commands auto-route by platform (web/android/ios).

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: All-in-one QA + quality-management toolkit; commands namespaced /qa:<name>. Serves QA/QC, QA Managers and Product Ops. scaffold creates a standard POM project from scratch (compiling Playwright-Web or Appium-App framework + example login test) so users just /qa:plan-tests next. Automation (Playwright Web + Appium iOS/Android, auto-routes by platform): scaffold/sitemap/exploratory/exploratory-ui/plan-tests/find-elements/cook/run/fix/analyze/count-cases/review/push-code/merge-request. exploratory-ui checks the built UI against its Figma design using a LOCAL CV+OCR engine (opencv + scikit-image + tesseract/rapidocr) returning TYPED, per-region findings — text content (static label vs dynamic value: catch Products≠Product, ignore data), background vs text color (CIEDE2000), typography (font weight/đậm-nhạt, size, serif-vs-sans family) and layout/alignment — so heavy image+OCR work runs on-device and only tiny JSON verdicts reach the AI (token-thrifty); the report is plain-language and log-bug-ready. ui-engine-install sets up its isolated venv. sitemap crawls the whole app/web (or one feature) to declare each screen's elements + build the navigation map (discovery only — no tests/bugs). Manual QA (distinct names): analyze-spec/plan-gen-testcases/gen-testcases/count-testcases/est-sp/explain-bug/check-duplicate-bug/log-bug/update-board. Quality management & reporting (read-only): quality-report (dashboard), bug-analysis (deep board analysis of any board over a range — adaptive status grouping + root causes + spike days), release-gate (Go/No-Go), traceability (RTM), release-notes, risk (risk matrix), triage (RICE), sla (compliance), postmortem (blameless incident RCA). Optional Lark/Slack/Teams/Telegram notify + Cloudflare R2 / S3 report upload.
